{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Mithra's blade
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Mithra]] has a gold-and-silver blade.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mithra]] is the Wanderer's blade and it glimmered in answer.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c1">''City of Light'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
